description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to the main branch and on create events. Use a matrix strategy to build wheels on ubuntu-20.04, windows-2022, and macos-10.15. For each job, check out the code, set up QEMU if on Linux, install Python 3.9, prepare the environment by installing dependencies and running make cython, build wheels using cibuildwheel, upload the wheels as an artifact, and publish them to TestPyPI if the event is a push with a tag.
